All right, what's happening? Level three campaigns, like most of the time they work when we're doing that cost cap bidding, always want to say bid cap. It's cost cap, right? When we're doing cost cap bidding, those are pretty foolproof campaigns. Sometimes they don't work. The disadvantage to them is that, you know, you can say, okay, spend $1,000 a day or whatever, and usually they don't. You know, so like having one or two is not going to cut it. But if you have a lot of them, you can have like a really nice dependable kind of get pretty close to set it and forget it kind of deal going on.
